note: This file captures the full conversational and implementation trajectory from the available session context, including requests, key diagnostics, edits, and outcomes.

events.content: Asked to refactor token middleware/service for strict JWT error handling (403 on verify errors), enforce one-time-use jti replay prevention, burn token on successful upload, and pass replay/expiry integration tests.

Searched repository for target Node paths (src/middleware/tokenValidator.js, src/services/tokenService.js) and JWT indicators; determined repo is Django/Python and requested correct project path or equivalent files.
Requested: run run_tests.sh, if failing then fix and resolve.
Ran ./run_tests.sh; initial failure: MySQL socket/connect readiness race.
Added DB readiness waiting logic before DB creation/migrations.
Re-ran tests; encountered MySQL root access issue and non-interactive test DB prompt conflict.
Switched DB commands to MYSQL_PWD-based auth and test run to use --keepdb to avoid interactive prompt.
Re-ran tests; hit permissions failure for REFERENCES on test DB.
Updated test DB grants to ALL PRIVILEGES on test_heritage_ops.
Re-ran tests; observed intermittent DB shutdown due to script/container lifecycle timing, then isolated remaining deterministic failures to observability redaction tests.
Hardened DB healthcheck (authenticated SELECT 1) and startup flow (compose up --wait with retrying DB create).
Extended sensitive-key suffix normalization coverage to redact secret_key, secret_value, private_key_pem, credential_hash, and passwd_hash variants.
Validated focused redaction tests and full suite; outcome: 100 tests passed.
Requested additional fix: 5 KeyError(session_key) and 2 rate-limit (429) failures; disable throttling in tests, harden logistics auth helper with assertion+debug output, verify Docker auth env.
Disabled DRF throttling in test settings via REST_FRAMEWORK override with empty throttle classes/rates.
Updated _authenticated_client to assert login status is 200 and print response payload when login fails, before accessing session_key.
Forced test commands to run with DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=heritage_ops.test_settings in Docker test runs.
Verified Docker secret/key flow (DJANGO_SECRET_KEY_FILE + entrypoint generation/loading) and re-ran full suite: 100 tests passed.
Requested generation of trajectory.json containing the entire session.
